subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the Word through which the oceans surged in the hearts of them that have known Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بالکلمه التی منها تموجت فی قلوب العارفین بحور
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
